title: Unidentified Twi'lek Sith

{{Quote|Back! Only death lies this way!|[[Kol Skywalker]]|<ref name="Broken" />}}
This '''Sith''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], was a [[Sith/Legends|member]] of the [[One Sith]] faction around the time of the [[Sith–Imperial War]], a cooperative effort by the One Sith and [[Roan Fel]]'s [[Fel Empire|Galactic Empire]] to eliminate the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. In [[130 ABY]], [[Darth Krayt]], leader of the One Sith, organized an [[Army/Legends|army]] of many [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] for an [[Massacre at Ossus|assault]] on the [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]], bent on [[Third Jedi Purge|purging]] it of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] with the assistance of a complement of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|troops]]. During the fighting, the Jedi [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]], [[Kol Skywalker]], defended a shuttle carrying escaping [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Younglings]] in his charge, [[Death/Legends|killing]] many of the opposing force single-handed, including the Twi'lek.

==Biography==
This [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] joined the [[One Sith]]<ref name="Broken" /> and completed his [[Sith training|training]], earning full-body [[Sith tattoo]]s,<ref name="Freddye">[[Freddye Lins]]' comments in the back of [[Legacy (2006) 39|''Legacy'' (2006) 39]]</ref> during or prior to the [[Sith–Imperial War]], a combined effort by the Sith and the [[Fel Empire]] to seize dominant governmental control of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].<ref name="Broken" /> As a result of the conflict, much of the Alliance was assimilated into the Empire and the [[New Jedi Order]] was forced into [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exile]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], refusing to assist a government allied with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].<ref name="Allies">[[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]]</ref> The Twi'lek was chosen to be part of an [[Army/Legends|army]] of [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] engineered for an [[Massacre at Ossus|assault]] on the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Temple]] of Ossus, the last major [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] stronghold in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Broken" />

Krayt's [[Hand]], [[Darth Nihl]], was placed in command of the operation, which quickly put the Ossus Jedi Temple under siege. The Twi'lek Sith was among those who stormed into the Temple, fighting to eliminate the Jedi.<ref name="Broken" /> The Sith army [[Death/Legends|killed]] half of the Jedi there, scattering the rest across the galaxy, as well as a large number of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shaper caste|shapers]] committed to an experimental Vong [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] [[Ossus Project|project]].<ref name="Ghosts">''[[Star Wars: Legacy: Ghosts]]''</ref>

One group that was forced out during the fighting consisted primarily of [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Younglings]] ushered by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Kol Skywalker]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Wolf Sazen]], and their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]]. The duo ordered their students, [[Shado Vao]] and [[Cade Skywalker]], to take the children to safety aboard a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] so they could escape the Temple. After Sazen was wounded and taken aboard, Kol stayed behind to buy time for them to take off. He killed many enemy soldiers and among the dead was this Twi'lek, whose [[Cho sun/Legends|sword arm was severed]] near the elbow by the Jedi leader. Just after the shuttle took flight, Kol was killed by Nihl and his body rested near this Sith's corpse. The massacre marked the official end of the Sith–Imperial War and the beginning of a [[Third Jedi Purge|Jedi Purge]].<ref name="Broken" />

==Personality and traits==
This Sith, a [[red]]-skinned Twi'lek male, was a member of the One Sith Order led by Darth Krayt. He wielded a red [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] when he fought Kol Skywalker on Ossus. Neither his skill with a lightsaber nor those with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], if any, were proficient enough for him to be able to survive an encounter with the Grand Master of the New Jedi Order,<ref name="Broken" /> considered by Yuuzhan Vong [[Master Shaper]] [[Nei Rin]] to be the Jedi Order's greatest warrior.<ref name="Ghosts" /> The Twi'lek had [[black]] Sith tattoos all over his body, a sign he was a fully-[[Sith training|trained]] member of the One Sith, and wore [[Armor/Legends|armor]] to protect his torso when in battle.<ref name="Broken" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TwilekSithDeath-2006Legacy1.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The death of this Sith]]
The Twi'lek Sith appeared in the [[Legacy (2006) 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]''. He was killed in the same panel where he was first seen, though his head was later shown beside Kol Skywalker's fallen body.

This Twi'lek appeared with the red skin pigmentation associated with [[Lethan/Legends|Lethan]] Twi'leks.<ref name="Broken" /> However, it is still unconfirmed if he was of this race because the One Sith Order tattooed the members of its legion who had completed their [[Sith training|training]] red with black designs.<ref name="Freddye" /> Two other Twi'lek Sith, [[Darth Ruyn]] and [[Darth Talon]], also share this coloring.<ref name="Legacy 2006 2">[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]]</ref>

This character's death sequence is another sighting of [[Blood/Legends|blood]] from a lightsaber-inflicted wound. When lightsabers cut through flesh, they instantly flash-cauterize the wound, leaving no time for any blood to escape the victim's body.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''</ref> This was first seen in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] when [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], a Jedi in hiding following the rise of the first [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], cut off the arm of a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]].
